name: Qdrant
description: High-performance vector database for AI search, RAG, and embeddings — with the built-in Qdrant Web UI for browsing collections and running queries.

configFields.label: API key
configFields.help: Auto-generated. Required as the `api-key` header on every request, and to open the Web UI.

connection.title: Connect to Qdrant
connection.description: Open the Qdrant Web UI in your browser (it lives under /dashboard), or point a client at the REST API. Every request needs the API key below.

outputs.label: Qdrant Web UI
outputs.help: The dashboard is at this URL under /dashboard. Paste the API key when it asks.

outputs.label: API key
outputs.help: Send it as the `api-key` header on every request.
